headlines.text: PLANNER PEEKED! VAULT OPENED DAYS BEFORE CEREMONY

reactions.chalkboard: THE ELEVEN-SECOND ESPRESSO — cracks under gentle pressure

headlines.text: Theft Window Narrows to Final Two Nights

reactions.chalkboard: THE TWO-NIGHT BLEND — short window, strong finish

headlines.text: Capsule Was Whole Three Nights Before Opening, Witness Confirms

reactions.chalkboard: THE UNNAMED SOURCE — served warm, no questions

kickers.text: Two nights. Somewhere in Lanternside, somebody is counting them too.
Whoever opened that vault closed it gently. The Ledger finds that detail worth your attention.
The Ledger thanks the neighbors who answered questions today. All of them. Even the fourth time.
